name: Dayma Itamunoala
title: SVP, Head of Multifamily (Ontario)
bio: Leading Ontario's premier multifamily advisory team with over $1.12B in completed transactions. Dayma specializes in institutional-grade multifamily investment sales and advisory services across the Greater Toronto Area and Ontario markets.

name: Aman Rana
title: Associate Vice President, Seniors Housing
bio: Specializing in seniors housing and healthcare real estate transactions across Ontario. Aman brings deep expertise in retirement homes, long-term care facilities, and seniors-focused multifamily developments.

name: Zoe Prachter
title: Transaction Manager
bio: Managing transaction processes from LOI to closing, ensuring seamless execution of complex multifamily deals. Zoe coordinates due diligence, documentation, and stakeholder communications throughout the transaction lifecycle.

name: Yianni Tsiampas
title: Associate
bio: Supporting multifamily investment sales and market analysis across Ontario. Yianni focuses on financial modeling, market research, and client relationship management for institutional and private investors.

name: Chris Bertucci
title: Associate
bio: Analyzing investment opportunities and supporting transaction execution across Ontario's multifamily markets. Chris specializes in underwriting, due diligence coordination, and investor relations.
